description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 15 (Sunday), I attended the Hanno City Local Performing Arts Festival held at Hanno City Civic Hall.

This festival aims to promote and pass down local performing arts. Each year, groups from within and outside the city showcase their performances. This year marked the 45th edition of the festival.

This year's performers included the "Sagami-style Sato Kagura Five-Generation Hagihara Yoshiro Group Hagibai-kai"—designated as Tokyo Intangible Folk Cultural Property—the "Musashi-Ogose High School Wadaiko Club Seiryuu" from Ogose Town, and the "Maeda Hayashi Preservation Society" from our city.

I offer my heartfelt thanks to everyone who works tirelessly to promote and pass down local performing arts. I also extend my sincere gratitude to the members of the Hanno City Local Performing Arts Preservation Society for their efforts in making this performance possible.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13211.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City Local Performing Arts Festival, Fiscal Year 2025
